features.featureTitle: In `frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts`, update the URL of the 'mAadhaar' entry in the SERVICES category to 'https://uidai.gov.in/en/' and update the URL of the 'Xiaomi Home' entry in the SERVICES category to 'http://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xiaomi.smarthome&hl=en_IN'. Both links must continue to open in a new tab.
